title: cynodon poissonii
intro: Cynodon poissonii, also known as Poisson's couch grass, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Cynodon poissonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin infections. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
